valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Mon 4 May 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Tue 5 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low FitzRoy 1011 losing its identity by 0600 tomorrow. New low expected Forties 1011 by same time

Viking.text:
Wind
Cyclonic becoming northwesterly 3 to 5, occasionally 6 at first in south and later in north.
Sea state
Moderate, occasionally slight at first, then becoming rough later in north.
Weather
Wintry showers.
Visibility
Good, occasionally poor.
